case_title: GOMEZ, RODERICK U. VS VED, HARSHIKA A.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY GOMEZ, RODERICK U. AS TO DEFENDANT VED, HARSHIKA A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-25-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF SEP-15-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, RODERICK U. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VED, HARSHIKA A. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VED, HARSHIKA A. HEARING SET FOR NOV-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, RODERICK U. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VED, HARSHIKA A. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VED, HARSHIKA A.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VED, HARSHIKA A.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-09-1993, GRANTED
